title: Legacy001 TabPFN benchmark or meta-signal
summary: Test TabPFN as an experimental standalone OOF benchmark or as a single meta-signal, while preserving the legacy-001 baseline.
rationale: TabPFN is a tabular foundation model and may offer a very different inductive bias from RealMLP and GBDTs. It should be tested cautiously because its preprocessing expectations, dataset-size limits, GPU requirements, and licensing constraints differ from the current pipeline.
implementation_hint: Prefer a bounded experiment: either produce TabPFN OOF/test predictions on a restricted compatible feature view and compare against RealMLP, or add TabPFN OOF predictions as one meta-feature only if true OOF is preserved. Do not replace the full parent pipeline, and do not apply scaling or one-hot preprocessing if TabPFN guidance says to avoid it.
expected_effect: Provide an orthogonal benchmark or useful meta-signal if TabPFN generalizes differently on this tabular F1 task.
risk: May exceed practical size limits, be slow, or create licensing concerns; meta-feature use must be true OOF to avoid leakage.
